headline: Lockheed Stock’s Brutal Quarter Is Sending a Signal
summary: Lockheed  stock offers investors a chance to buy the dip, according to Citi.  Wednesday morning, analyst John Godyn upgraded Lockheed shares to Buy from Hold.  Coming into Wednesday trading, Lockheed stock was up 10% over the past 12 months but down 23% since the start of the war in Iran.

headline: Lockheed Martin Announces Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Results Webcast
summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT) will webcast live its second quarter 2026 earnings results conference call (listen-only mode) on Thursday, July 23, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. Jim Taiclet, chairman, president and CEO; Evan Scott, chief financial officer; and Mark Kvasnak, vice president, Investor Relations, will discuss second quarter 2026 earnings results, provide updates on key topics and answer questions. Second quarter 2026 earnings results will be published prior to the market opening on July 23.

headline: Citi adds Karman Holdings catalyst watch as ’Defense Now’ thesis takes hold
summary: Investing.com -- Citi has upgraded Lockheed Martin to Buy and opened a positive 90-day catalyst watch on Karman Holdings, as analyst John Godyn said his tactical framework of "Aerospace First, Defense Next" has evolved into "Defense Now."

headline: LOCKHEED MARTIN CORP (NYSE:LMT) Offers a Strong Case for Dividend Investors
